title: Context Assembly, Trust Labels, Token Budgets, Truncation, and Compaction · Runtime Lens: Context Token Budget
summary: The agent appends everything, places untrusted text beside system instructions, trims oldest messages blindly, trusts summaries, and cannot detect lost constraints after compaction. Predict authority, model and API behavior, state, tool effects, budgets, privacy, safety, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the context token budget increment in budgeted provenance-aware context builder. Learners progress through prediction, e…
objectives: Reserve output and tool budget, measure or conservatively estimate input tokens, and admit context by task-specific value and risk.
Label each context item by source, authority, tenant, purpose, timestamp, sensitivity, trust, instruction status, and expiry.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

A defensible solution applies Context Token Budget, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to budgeted provenance-aware context builder.

content.code:
# Worked focus: agentpy-context-token-budget — Reserve output and tool budget, measure or conservatively estimate input tokens, and admit context by task-specific value and risk.
# Evidence: agentpy-worked-agentpy-context-assembly-compaction-2
# Competency: agentpy-worked-agentpy-context-assembly-compaction-2.
# Case 7417: a multilingual case-routing evaluation.
# Operating constraint: last valid checkpoint, audit trail, kill switch, and rollback path must survive failure.
# Changed case: change model capability, API version, schema, or provider state and revalidate the adapter.
def worked_agentpy_context_assembly_compaction_2(candidate_tokens: int = 18000, admitted_tokens: int = 12000, token_budget: int = 14000, trust_labeled_items: int = 42, unlabeled_items: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked2 = "worked2-2dekrow-7417"
    assert evidence_variant_worked2
    evidence_axes_worked2 = (
        "authorityworked2",
        "interaction7417",
        "tool2dekrow",
        "stateworked27417",
        "evaluation7417worked2",
        "recovery2dekrow7417",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked2)) == 6
    if candidate_tokens < 1 or admitted_tokens < 0:
        return False, admitted_tokens, "context-count"
    if admitted_tokens > token_budget:
        return False, admitted_tokens, "context-budget"
    if trust_labeled_items < 1 or unlabeled_items > 0:
        return False, unlabeled_items, "trust-label-gap"
    if candidate_tokens < admitted_tokens:
        return False, candidate_tokens, "context-accounting"
    assert admitted_tokens <= token_budget and unlabeled_items == 0
    return True, admitted_tokens, "bounded-context-assembly"
